children.text: Morgan and Antonio were very sweet and kind! I was happy to show them around San Diego. Antonio was even nice enough to wash my dishes also lol. I'm jealous that they are able to travel the country doing what they love with the one they love. They were great!
Lucky and Antonio stayed with us for 3 nights. They were a joy to have! Lovely stories and colors, we shared some tea :)
Morgan is a really awesome and energetic person. She and I have always gone on glorious adventures together.
Amanda is like my little sister. She's such a beautiful soul . She's very intuitive for her age and extremely adventurous. She's very sweet and positive to be around, always smiling :)
She is full of live and positivity!

Beth is one of the most creative and wide hearted girl I know! Whether she's painting, driving , or cooking, she has the most creative nature. Her best frind is her beautiful child (dog) Alfredo who also has the most adventurous bubbly personality I've seen . Beth loves to adventure! If you stay on her couch, ask her to take you o beautiful hiking trails where even the trees have personalities! I promise, you won't be disappointed!
